expectations.text: The output identifies a goroutine lifetime or leak risk
expectations.evidence: Finding 1 calls out an unbounded goroutine and explains the leak/shutdown risk.

expectations.text: The output explicitly discusses ctx.Done() or cancellation handling
expectations.evidence: Finding 1 explicitly says there is no `case <-ctx.Done(): return` and centers the fix around cancellation.

expectations.text: The output includes a Go fix snippet showing a cancellation path
expectations.evidence: The code block in Finding 1 adds `case <-ctx.Done(): return` and handles closed `jobs` with `job, ok := <-jobs`.

expectations.text: The output identifies code locations for the finding
